description_long: This is a male adult figure dressed in a buttoned-up collared shirt with rolled sleeves and fitted trousers. He is wearing dark shoes and accessorized with sunglasses, giving him a modern, urban appearance. The figure has a bald head and a clean-shaven face, with a neutral expression. His arms are slightly extended outward, and his posture is upright and relaxed. The clothing fits closely to the body, suggesting a casual yet put-together style suitable for city environments. The overall look is that of a typical pedestrian one might encounter on a city street or in a business district.
description: A bald adult male wearing a collared shirt, fitted trousers, dark shoes, and sunglasses, standing upright with arms slightly outstretched. The style is modern and urban, suitable for city streets.
description_view_0: Front view showing the collared shirt, sunglasses, facial features, and both arms extended outward.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the head, sunglasses, and the fit of the shirt and trousers.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the shirt, trousers, and the bald head.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the profile, arm, and the side fit of the clothing.
attribute_clothing_type: long-sleeve button-up shirt with rolled sleeves and fitted trousers
